data.title: In 2025, crypto saw a surge in IPOs as Circle, Bullish, and eToro went public, while Kraken prepared for its market debut.
data.description: In 2025, there was a surge of cryptocurrency companies making their way to Wall Street. Circle, Bullish, and eToro all went public, while Kraken prepared for its market debut. This move marked a significant shift towards mainstream acceptance of digital currencies, with billions of dollars being raised through these initial public offerings. The cryptocurrency industry's presence on the stock market was further solidified, reflecting the growing interest and investment in this evolving sector.

data.title: Interact Marketing cautions against unchecked AI content due to high levels and limited fact-checking, posing trust risks.
data.description: Interact Marketing has raised concerns about the prevalent use of detectable artificial intelligence, citing high levels of AI content, inadequate fact-checking, and evolving quality standards. The increased reliance on AI poses significant trust and visibility risks. The warning comes amidst reports of shifting standards within the industry.

data.title: Global brand LISEN releases 25W AI-Powered MagSafe Car Wireless Fast Charger on Amazon, redefining on-the-go power.
data.description: On December 27, 2025, LISEN, a leading global brand known for mobile charging and automotive accessories, introduced the LISEN Qi2.2 25W MagSafe Car Charger on Amazon. The charger is designed as an advanced in-car wireless charging option with a power output of 25 watts.

data.title: Warning by Apollo Global Management's chief economist: US economy too reliant on AI. S&P 500 up 18% this year. If AI bubble bursts in 2026, significant economic fallout.核心的担忧在于， Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: The chief economist of Apollo Global Management Inc., Torsten Slok, has issued a cautionary warning in their 2026 outlook that the U.S. economy is excessively reliant on artificial intelligence for growth. As per the report, the SPY has experienced an 18% increase this year. Approaching 2026, the S&P 500 is now heavily dependent on AI, making it vulnerable to significant risks. If the AI bubble bursts, it could lead to widespread economic ramifications due to the identified "single point of failure." Apollo's primary concern revolves around this vulnerability. For extensive details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stock market hits record highs as 2025 ends. Tesla, Nvidia, Google, Apple near buy points, leading market growth.
data.description: As 2025 comes to a close, the stock market has surged to record levels. Leading the charge are prominent companies such as Tesla, Nvidia, Google, and Apple, all currently trading just above their buy points. Dow Jones Futures indicate a strong market trend, with Tesla and Nvidia at the forefront among the five major companies in favorable buying zones. This positive momentum showcases the market's robust performance as the year wanes.

data.title: Palantir, Nvidia, Intuitive Surgical among top stocks near buy points as market nears end of 2025.
data.description: As the 2025 market approaches its end, Palantir, Nvidia, and Intuitive Surgical are standout stocks worth keeping an eye on. These companies, along with two others, are showing promising signs of nearing buy points. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Z.ai releases GLM-4.7, a model for real-world development, solidifying as China's OpenAI.
data.description: On December 22, 2025, Z.ai unveiled GLM-4.7, the newest version of its GLM series. This advanced large language model is specifically crafted for managing complex tasks in production settings. GLM-4.7 caters to development environments characterized by extended task durations, regular tool utilization, and...

data.title: Coinbase CEO cautions against reopening GENIUS Act, criticizes bank lobbying to impede stablecoin rewards and competition.
data.description: The CEO of Coinbase, Brian Armstrong, has cautioned against the reopening of the GENIUS Act, emphasizing that it would be considered crossing a significant threshold. He accused banks of actively urging Congress to impede stablecoin incentives and restrict market competition. Armstrong's stance underscores the growing tensions between cryptocurrency platforms and traditional financial institutions.

data.title: AAVE price target: $179-$183 likely by early January amid current consolidation, with potential 14-17% upside in 5 days due to whale accumulation & oversold RSI at $156.87.
data.description: According to the latest AAVE price forecast, there is a potential increase of 14-17%, leading AAVE to reach a range of $179 to $183 in the next five days. This optimistic projection is backed by significant whale accumulation and oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI) conditions observed at the current price of $156.87. These factors indicate a positive momentum for AAVE in the short term.

data.title: LDO predicted to reach $0.66-$0.70 by Jan '26 amid market fear, showing 16-23% potential rise from $0.57.
data.description: Experts are forecasting a possible increase of 16-23% in the price of LDO, reaching a range of $0.66-$0.70 within the next 4-6 weeks. This prediction is backed by bullish MACD divergence and oversold conditions observed at the current price of $0.57.

data.title: HBAR price forecast aims for $0.1160 by end of 2025; weak bullish momentum despite decline.
data.description: The forecast for HBAR indicates a slight increase towards $0.1160 by the end of December 31, 2025. Although there has been a recent drop, technical analysis suggests a mild bullish trend with limited momentum.

data.title: WIF price may recover to $0.35-$0.42 by January '26 despite current bearish trends, supported at $0.31.
data.description: The price prediction for WIF suggests a potential rebound towards the range of $0.35 to $0.42 within the next month. Accumulation by large holders is strengthening support at $0.31. However, there is a risk of downward movement due to current bearish momentum.

data.title: PEPE forecast: Dropping to $0.00003136 before rebounding to $0.000035 by year-end. Technical analysis suggests 23% drop then recovery.
data.description: According to a price prediction analysis, the value of PEPE is anticipated to drop by 23% to reach the support level of $0.00003136. However, a recovery is projected to occur afterwards, with the forecast indicating a rise to $0.000035 by December 31st. This prediction is based on technical analysis.

data.title: ALGO price estimate: $0.16-$0.19 in Jan 2026 with 33-58% growth potential within 4 weeks due to technical indicators.
data.description: A prediction for the price of ALGO suggests a potential increase of 33-58%, leading to a range of $0.16-$0.19 within the next 4 weeks. This anticipation is supported by the oversold conditions of the Relative Strength Index (RSI) and the emerging bullish momentum of the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD).

data.title: Webroot ranked best for fast threat detection in 2026, as per Software Experts. Critical for PC security.
data.description: On December 27, 2025, a recent industry analysis conducted by Software Experts has revealed that Webroot has been recognized as the leading platform for swift threat detection and providing efficient PC security measures. The report emphasizes the escalating issues regarding malware, phishing threats, and overall system security. The analysis highlights the significant role of Webroot in addressing these concerns.

data.title: Denver School Choice Expo with over 40 schools and activities on Jan 10 for parents seeking new schools for their kids.
data.description: Over 40 schools and family-oriented activities will be featured at a complimentary expo in Denver. Taking place on January 10th, this event offers Denver parents the opportunity to explore various educational options for their children.

data.title: Predicting $4.84 rebound and $3.36 drop for INJ in Jan 2026, as short-term signal is positive but medium-term forecast shows bearish trend.
data.description: The price prediction for INJ indicates conflicting signals ahead, suggesting a potential short-term rise to $4.84. However, the medium-term forecast for Injective points to a target of $3.36 due to bearish momentum.

data.title: CRV projected to hit $0.45-$0.50 in 4-6 weeks. Oversold conditions and bullish signals indicate a potential recovery from $0.38.
data.description: Experts predict that the price of CRV could reach a target range of $0.45 to $0.50, indicating a potential increase from the current price of $0.38. This prediction is based on oversold conditions and a bullish MACD divergence, suggesting a possible reversal in the near future.

data.title: FLOKI price predicted to reach $0.000055 in 7 days, aiming for $0.000185 based on oversold RSI and bullish MACD.
data.description: Forecasts for FLOKI suggest a short-term target of $0.000055 and a medium-term potential of $0.000185. These predictions are supported by an oversold RSI and positive MACD histogram patterns.

data.title: Consumer365 recognized Sage as the best invoicing software in the UK for 2026 due to its seamless billing and payment features for businesses of all sizes.
data.description: On December 27, 2025, Consumer365 released its 2026 assessment of invoicing systems in the UK, highlighting Sage for its versatile invoicing features tailored for a wide range of businesses, from individual contractors to medium-sized enterprises. The evaluation praised Sage for its comprehensive capabilities and adaptability.
